violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored on the meat grinder. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024

The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2024

Employees' food items were observed stored in the meat cooler. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/16/2024
Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

Raw animal foods (eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (banana's) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024
The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (apples) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
Chemicals (WD-40) were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles on prep table. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by large and small droppings. The presence of flies is not controlled as evidenced by small flying insects. The presence of cockroaches is not controlled as evidenced by dead roaches on glue boards. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
Food and drinks were observed stored on the floor throughout establishment. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
Single service items were observed stored on the floor in the old walk-in cooler. Single service items must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Wood is used in the construction of prep table (legs). Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving and refrigeration throughout establishment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

At time of inspection, plumbing on 3 bay sink was in poor repair. Per interview with PIC, pipe broke earlier today. Plumber was on site and was fixed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of litter, leaf litter, and debris. The dumpster area must be maintained clean to prevent harborage for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed throughout establishment. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
